data_description.protocol_version: Select 2.0b for XML-SOAP with mutual TLS, or 3.0 for REST with OAuth2

data_description.vtn_url: Full HTTPS URL of the VTN SOAP endpoint
data_description.ven_name: Unique identifier for this VEN (agree with operator)
data_description.ca_cert_path: Leave blank to use the system CA store

data_description.vtn_url: Base URL of the VTN REST API (without trailing slash)
data_description.ven_name: Unique identifier for this VEN (agree with operator)
data_description.token_url: Full URL of the OAuth2 token endpoint
data_description.client_id: Issued by the grid operator's identity provider
data_description.client_secret: Issued by the grid operator's identity provider

data_description.target_entity: The number entity that controls inverter active power (0–100%)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach VTN — check the URL and network connectivity
error.invalid_cert: Certificate or key file not found or unreadable
error.invalid_auth: OAuth2 credentials rejected — check client ID and secret

init.title: Signal mapping
init.description: Map OpenADR SIMPLE signal levels to inverter power setpoints. For OpenADR 3.0, you can also adjust the poll interval.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to check the VTN for new events (OpenADR 3.0 only, 10–3600s)
